overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character walking through an ancient Egyptian desert oasis along the Nile river. The character traverses sandy beaches, crosses shallow water, and continues along dirt paths while palm trees and ancient architecture line the horizon under a bright partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert oasis riverbank with palm grove

events.description: group of three mounted riders gallops past from left to right along the shore

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sandy riverbank toward the water's edge, passing through palm groves

notable_agents.action: three mounted riders galloping past from left to right along the shoreline

entered.detail: dense cluster of date palms providing shade along the left bank
scattered palm trees lining the right side of the sandy path
rolling golden sand dunes rising in the background
wide river with shimmering water reflecting sunlight
traditional wooden sailboat with triangular sail on the water
ancient Egyptian temple structures visible on the distant shore

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sandy riverbank lined with dense palm groves on both sides. The Nile river shimmers ahead with a traditional felucca sailboat visible on the water, while ancient stone buildings stand in the far distance. At 17 seconds, three mounted NPC riders gallop past from left to right, kicking up sand as they ride along the shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river crossing with muddy banks

events.description: character steps from sandy shore into the shallow river water
character reaches the opposite bank and steps out of the water

agents.ego_description: wading through waist-deep murky water toward the opposite grassy shore

entered.detail: shallow murky water with visible ripples and reflections
green vegetation and reeds lining the river edge

segments.scene_description: The character enters the Nile river and wades through the shallow water toward the opposite bank. The water is murky with visible ripples reflecting the afternoon sun. The grassy banks with reeds become visible on both sides as the character progresses, while the ancient stone buildings ahead shift from the left to center of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy riverbank trail leading to desert path

events.description: character transitions from wading to walking as they climb the grassy bank
ground surface changes from wet grass and mud to dry packed dirt

agents.ego_description: walking up the grassy incline and continuing along the dirt trail away from the river toward distant structures

entered.detail: winding dirt trail with visible wagon tracks and scattered stones
small boulders and rocks along the path edge

segments.scene_description: Exiting the water, the character climbs onto a grassy bank that quickly transitions to a dry dirt path. The trail winds through sparse grassland with scattered rocks, leading toward the ancient stone buildings that now appear closer in the center of the frame. The camera follows steadily as the character walks away from the river into the open landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a lush riverbank through the shallow waters of the Nile and onto a dry inland trail. It begins with the character walking along a sandy shore lined with dense palm groves, where a traditional felucca sailboat shimmers on the water and mounted riders gallop past, kicking up sand. As the character leaves the shore, the scene shifts into the murky, sun-rippled waters of the river, wading toward the opposite bank while ancient stone buildings gradually move toward the center of the frame. The camera then follows the character as they exit the water and climb onto a grassy bank that quickly transitions into a dry dirt path. Finally, the trail winds through sparse grassland and scattered rocks, leading the character away from the river and deeper into the open landscape toward the looming stone architecture.
